lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਹਰਿ ਹੋਇ ਦਇਆਲੁ ਤਾਂ ਗੁਰੁ ਪੂਰਾ ਮੇਲਾਵਏ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: naanak har hoe deaal taan gur pooraa melaave |5|
lines.english: O Nanak, when the Lord becomes merciful, then He leads us to meet the Perfect Guru. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਜੀਉ ਕਰੀ ਤਿਸ ਵਿਟਉ ਚਉ ਖੰਨੀਐ ਜੋ ਮੈ ਪਿਰੀ ਦਿਖਾਵਏ ॥
lines.translit: hau jeeo karee tis vittau chau khaneeai jo mai piree dikhaave |
lines.english: I would cut my living body into four pieces for anyone who shows me my Beloved.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਜੋਰੁ ਹਉਮੈ ਤਨਿ ਮਾਇਆ ਕੂੜੀ ਆਵੈ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: antar jor haumai tan maaeaa koorree aavai jaae |
lines.english: The power of egotism prevails within, and the body is controlled by Maya; the false ones come and go in reincarnation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਕਾ ਫੁਰਮਾਇਆ ਮੰਨਿ ਨ ਸਕੀ ਦੁਤਰੁ ਤਰਿਆ ਨ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: satigur kaa furamaaeaa man na sakee dutar tariaa na jaae |
lines.english: If someone does not obey the Command of the True Guru, he cannot cross over the treacherous world-ocean.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਦਰਿ ਕਰੇ ਜਿਸੁ ਆਪਣੀ ਸੋ ਚਲੈ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਭਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: nadar kare jis aapanee so chalai satigur bhaae |
lines.english: Whoever is blessed with the Lord's Glance of Grace, walks in harmony with the Will of the True Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨੀ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਮੰਨਿਆਂ ਹਉ ਤਿਨ ਕੇ ਲਾਗਉ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: jinee satigur maniaan hau tin ke laagau paae |
lines.english: I touch the feet of those who believe in and obey the True Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਕਾ ਦਰਸਨੁ ਸਫਲੁ ਹੈ ਜੋ ਇਛੈ ਸੋ ਫਲੁ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: satigur kaa darasan safal hai jo ichhai so fal paae |
lines.english: The Blessed Vision of the True Guru's Darshan is fruitful; through it, one obtains the fruits of his desires.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕੁ ਤਾ ਕਾ ਦਾਸੁ ਹੈ ਜਿ ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਰਹੈ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਇ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: naanak taa kaa daas hai ji anadin rahai liv laae |6|
lines.english: Nanak is the slave of those who, night and day, remain lovingly attuned to the Lord. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਾ ਪਿਰੀ ਪਿਆਰੁ ਬਿਨੁ ਦਰਸਨ ਕਿਉ ਤ੍ਰਿਪਤੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: jinaa piree piaar bin darasan kiau tripateeai |
lines.english: Those who are in love with their Beloved - how can they find satisfaction without His Darshan?

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਾ ਪਿਰੀ ਪਿਆਰੁ ਕਿਉ ਜੀਵਨਿ ਪਿਰ ਬਾਹਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: jinaa piree piaar kiau jeevan pir baahare |
lines.english: Those who are in love with their Beloved - how can they live without Him?

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਮਿਲੇ ਸੁਭਾਇ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਇਹੁ ਮਨੁ ਰਹਸੀਐ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: naanak mile subhaae guramukh ihu man rahaseeai |7|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Gurmukhs meet Him with ease, and this mind blossoms forth in joy. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਾ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਨੇਹੁ ਤੈ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਮ ਸਚੈ ਲਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: jinaa guramukh andar nehu tai preetam sachai laaeaa |
lines.english: Those Gurmukhs who are filled with love for You, my True Beloved,

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾਂ ਸਹੁ ਦੇਖਨਿ ਆਪਣਾ ਨਾਨਕ ਥੀਵਨਿ ਭੀ ਹਰੇ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: jaan sahu dekhan aapanaa naanak theevan bhee hare |8|
lines.english: When they see their Husband Lord, O Nanak, they are rejuvenated. ||8||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਤੀ ਅਤੈ ਡੇਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਪ੍ਰੇਮਿ ਸਮਾਇਆ ॥੯॥
lines.translit: raatee atai ddehu naanak prem samaaeaa |9|
lines.english: O Nanak, remain immersed in the Lord's Love, night and day. ||9||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸਚੀ ਆਸਕੀ ਜਿਤੁ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਮੁ ਸਚਾ ਪਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh sachee aasakee jit preetam sachaa paaeeai |
lines.english: The love of the Gurmukh is true; through it, the True Beloved is attained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚਾ ਪ੍ਰੇਮ ਪਿਆਰੁ ਗੁਰ ਪੂਰੇ ਤੇ ਪਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: sachaa prem piaar gur poore te paaeeai |
lines.english: True love and affection are obtained from the Perfect Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਰਹਹਿ ਅਨੰਦਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਹਜਿ ਸਮਾਈਐ ॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: anadin raheh anand naanak sehaj samaaeeai |10|
lines.english: Night and day, remain in bliss, O Nanak, immersed in intuitive peace and poise. ||10||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨੑਾ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਸਚਾ ਨੇਹੁ ਕਿਉ ਜੀਵਨੑਿ ਪਿਰੀ ਵਿਹੂਣਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: jinaa andar sachaa nehu kiau jeevana piree vihooniaa |
lines.english: How can those who have true love within them live without their Husband Lord?

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਬਹੂ ਨ ਹੋਵੈ ਭੰਗੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਈਐ ॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: kabahoo na hovai bhang naanak har gun gaaeeai |11|
lines.english: They never break, O Nanak, if one sings the Glorious Praises of the Lord. ||11||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਮੇਲੇ ਆਪਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਚਿਰੀ ਵਿਛੁੰਨਿਆ ॥੧੨॥
lines.translit: guramukh mele aap naanak chiree vichhuniaa |12|
lines.english: The Lord unites the Gurmukhs with Himself, O Nanak; they were separated from Him for such a long time. ||12||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨ ਕਉ ਪ੍ਰੇਮ ਪਿਆਰੁ ਤਉ ਆਪੇ ਲਾਇਆ ਕਰਮੁ ਕਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: jin kau prem piaar tau aape laaeaa karam kar |
lines.english: You grant Your Grace to those whom You Yourself bless with love and affection.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਹਸੈ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਰੋਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh hasai guramukh rovai |
lines.english: The Gurmukh laughs, and the Gurmukh cries.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਲੇਹੁ ਮਿਲਾਇ ਮੈ ਜਾਚਿਕ ਦੀਜੈ ਨਾਮੁ ਹਰਿ ॥੧੩॥
lines.translit: naanak lehu milaae mai jaachik deejai naam har |13|
lines.english: O Lord, please let Nanak meet with You; please bless this beggar with Your Name. ||13||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਪਾਵੈ ਪਾਰੁ ॥੧੪॥
lines.translit: guramukh naanak paavai paar |14|
lines.english: The Gurmukh, O Nanak, crosses over to the other shore. ||14||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਕਰੇ ਸਾਈ ਭਗਤਿ ਹੋਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: ji guramukh kare saaee bhagat hovai |
lines.english: Whatever the Gurmukh does, is devotional worship.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਹੋਵੈ ਸੁ ਕਰੇ ਵੀਚਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh hovai su kare veechaar |
lines.english: Whoever becomes Gurmukh contemplates the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨ ਕੇ ਮੁਖ ਸਦ ਉਜਲੇ ਤਿਤੁ ਸਚੈ ਦਰਬਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: tin ke mukh sad ujale tith sachai darabaar |
lines.english: Their faces are always radiant in the Court of the True Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨ ਬਹਦਿਆ ਉਠਦਿਆ ਕਦੇ ਨ ਵਿਸਰੈ ਜਿ ਆਪਿ ਬਖਸੇ ਕਰਤਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: tin bahadiaa utthadiaa kade na visarai ji aap bakhase karataar |
lines.english: Sitting down and standing up, they never forget the Creator, who forgives them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਾ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ਹੈ ਗੁਰਬਾਣੀ ਵੀਚਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: jinaa andar naam nidhaan hai gurabaanee veechaar |
lines.english: Those who have the Naam within, contemplate the Word of the Guru's Bani.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਮਿਲੇ ਨ ਵਿਛੁੜਹਿ ਜਿ ਮੇਲੇ ਸਿਰਜਣਹਾਰਿ ॥੧੫॥
lines.translit: naanak guramukh mile na vichhurreh ji mele sirajanahaar |15|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Gurmukhs are united with the Lord. Those united by the Creator Lord, shall never be separated again. ||15||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਦਰਿ ਕਰੇ ਜਿਸੁ ਆਪਣੀ ਤਿਸੁ ਲਾਏ ਹੇਤ ਪਿਆਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: nadar kare jis aapanee tis laae het piaar |
lines.english: The Lord casts His Glance of Grace, and inspires love and affection.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪੀਰਾਂ ਕੀ ਚਾਕਰੀ ਮਹਾਂ ਕਰੜੀ ਸੁਖ ਸਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: gur peeraan kee chaakaree mahaan kararree sukh saar |
lines.english: To work for the Guru, or a spiritual teacher, is terribly difficult, but it brings the most excellent peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਸੇਵੈ ਲਗਿਆ ਭਉਜਲੁ ਤਰੈ ਸੰਸਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: satigur kee sevai lagiaa bhaujal tarai sansaar |
lines.english: Joined to the service of the True Guru, the mortal being crosses over the terrifying world-ocean.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਚਿੰਦਿਆ ਫਲੁ ਪਾਇਸੀ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਬਿਬੇਕ ਬੀਚਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: man chindiaa fal paaeisee antar bibek beechaar |
lines.english: The fruits of the mind's desires are obtained, with clear contemplation and discriminating understanding within.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖ ਸੇਵਾ ਜੋ ਕਰੇ ਦੂਜੈ ਭਾਇ ਚਿਤੁ ਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh sevaa jo kare doojai bhaae chit laae |
lines.english: The self-willed manmukh may perform service, but his consciousness is attached to the love of duality.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਤਿਗੁਰਿ ਮਿਲਿਐ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਪਾਈਐ ਸਭੁ ਦੂਖ ਨਿਵਾਰਣਹਾਰੁ ॥੧੬॥
lines.translit: naanak satigur miliai prabh paaeeai sabh dookh nivaaranahaar |16|
lines.english: O Nanak, meeting the True Guru, God is found; He is the Eradicator of all sorrow. ||16||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੁਤੁ ਕਲਤੁ ਕੁਟੰਬੁ ਹੈ ਮਾਇਆ ਮੋਹੁ ਵਧਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: put kalat kuttanb hai maaeaa mohu vadhaae |
lines.english: Through Maya, his emotional attachment to children, spouse and relatives increases.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਰਗਹਿ ਲੇਖਾ ਮੰਗੀਐ ਕੋਈ ਅੰਤਿ ਨ ਸਕੀ ਛਡਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: darageh lekhaa mangeeai koee ant na sakee chhaddaae |
lines.english: He shall be called to account in the Court of the Lord, and in the end, no one will be able to save him.
